title: Revolve Group (RVLV) Stock Price & Overview
text: Revolve Group is an online fashion retailer serving Millennial and Generation Z consumers through content-centric marketing and influencer partnerships. Financial Summary: Q1 2026 net sales of $342.9 million (+16% YoY), earnings per share of $0.20 (+25% YoY), and active customers of 2.926 million (+8% YoY). Full-year 2025: net sales of $1.226 billion (+8% YoY) and adjusted EBITDA of $93.8 million (+35% YoY). Business Segments: REVOLVE segment focuses on contemporary and designer fashion, driving majority of revenue and growth. FORWARD segment serves the high-end luxury market with expanding brand partnerships and customer base. Strategic Initiatives: Physical retail expansion with flagship locations in Los Angeles and upcoming Miami location. Beauty category expansion and celebrity partnerships (Cardi B Grow-Good Beauty). AI-powered merchandising and customer experience improvements. Valuation: Trading at approximately 22-23x forward P/E based on 2026 earnings estimates of $0.87 per share. This represents a premium to specialty retail peers but reflects the company's growth trajectory and brand positioning. Investor Considerations: Strong earnings beat streak demonstrates management execution quality. Growth investments in brand and retail may pressure near-term margins. Fashion e-commerce competitive intensity remains a factor. Exposure to macroeconomic slowdowns and consumer discretionary spending.
